# daytona_webhook_initialization_status (Data Source)

Reads webhook initialization status for a Daytona organization. If no initialization record exists, the data source returns `initialized = false`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_webhook_initialization_status" "automation" {
  organization_id = "org_1234567890"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Webhook initialization record creation timestamp.
- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `initialized` (Boolean) Whether Daytona has initialized a Svix application for the organization.
- `last_error` (String) Last webhook initialization error, when available.
- `retry_count` (Number) Number of webhook initialization attempts.
- `svix_application_id` (String) Svix application ID, when initialized.
- `updated_at` (String) Webhook initialization record update timestamp.
